name: I slipped on ice at work in Murray Utah and hurt my back bad, what do I do right now?

mainEntity.name: I slipped on ice at work in Murray Utah and hurt my back bad, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer immediately, seek medical care, document everything, and file workers' comp claim fast.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report the incident to your employer and seek medical attention immediately.** Slip and fall at work in Utah typically falls under workers' compensation, not a lawsuit against your employer.[1] Key factors: (1) Notify your supervisor in writing within days; (2) Get all medical treatment documented; (3) File a workers' comp claim promptly to avoid denial. Take photos of the hazard, get witness names, and avoid giving statements to insurance without advice. Consult a workers' comp attorney to ensure your claim proceeds correctly.[1]

description: Report to employer immediately, seek medical care, document everything, and file workers' comp claim fast.
